## Research safeguards

- [ ] Nahw-Passage was not used for training, prompt tuning, checkpoint selection, or repeated model decisions.
- [ ] Official dataset splits were preserved.
- [ ] No private corpus text, credentials, model weights, checkpoints, adapters, or large generated outputs are committed.
- [ ] No metric is reported unless the model actually ran and raw predictions/reproducibility metadata are available.
- [ ] Any protocol, prompt, parser, metric, or dataset-role change is documented.
